name: @dignetwork/dig-client-dev
description: Build harness for the @dignetwork/dig-client npm package (read-crypto WASM). Not published; `npm run build:pkg` assembles the publishable ./pkg.

scripts.build:pkg: npm run build:web && npm run build:node && node scripts/assemble-pkg.mjs
scripts.test:pkg: node scripts/assemble-pkg.mjs --verify-only || (npm run build:pkg) ; node scripts/verify-pkg.mjs
scripts.smoke: cargo run --example gen_smoke_fixture > smoke_fixture.json && node smoke.mjs
